chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 212 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.606/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case 23.10.2023 None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Therefore, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
